concerns.text: Plan Step 5 (Memory Budget Check) and Plan Step 6 (Video I/O Stress Test) are missing corresponding implementation tasks. T023 implements a memory check but lacks the specific 'abort if > 6.5GB' logic and the 'Video I/O Stress Test' to decode a single frame is not represented in any task.

FR-001 and Edge Case 3 require dynamic retry logic (e.g., if --limit 100 fails, retry with --limit 10). Tasks T016-T019 only implement a static limit and error handling, missing the specific task to implement the dynamic retry mechanism.

Plan Step 2 (Submodule Integrity Check) is missing a dedicated task. While T017 handles 'Synthetic Mock Mode', there is no task explicitly verifying the presence of the VideoKR submodule and triggering the switch to mock mode if missing.

Task T004 (Phase 2) and Task T012 (Phase 3) both describe implementing `src/videokr_validation/utils.py`. This creates a duplicate implementation task. T012 should be removed or merged into T004 to avoid conflict.

Task T013 specifies logging to `artifacts/logs/env.log`, but T001 only creates `artifacts/`. A task is missing to explicitly create the `artifacts/logs/` subdirectory before T013 runs, risking a runtime error.
